text: Tucker Carlson on Trump: Here’s a leader who’s mocking the gods of his ancestors, mocking the God of gods, and exalting himself above them. Could this be the Antichrist? Well, who knows?
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普：看看这位领导人，他正在嘲笑他祖先的神，嘲笑万神之神，并将自己凌驾于他们之上。这会是敌基督吗？嗯，谁知道呢？

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli jets over Beirut and its suburbs. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列喷气式飞机飞越贝鲁特及其郊区。 @wfwitness

text: Tucker Carlson: Trump is mocking Jesus. He's making fun of Christianity. The central figure of the religion is being held up for mockery.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：特朗普正在嘲笑耶稣。他在取笑基督教。该宗教的核心人物正被拿来嘲弄。

text: Open Source Intel The IDF is preparing for increased rocket fire from Lebanon until the ceasefire takes effect. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军正准备应对来自黎巴嫩的火箭弹袭击增加，直到停火协议生效。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) US President Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon agreed on a 10-day ceasefire following phone calls he held with Lebanon's President Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu. Trump also informed that he is inviting the two leaders to the White House for the first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：美国总统特朗普宣布，在与黎巴嫩总统奥恩和以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通电话后，以色列和黎巴嫩同意停火10天。特朗普还表示，他将邀请这两位领导人前往白宫，进行自1983年以来以色列和黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈。推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam welcomes Trump's ceasefire announcement, calling it "a central Lebanese demand we have strived for since the first day of the war" and the primary goal of Tuesday's Washington meeting. Salam thanked the U.S., France, EU states, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Qatar, and Jordan for their efforts. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：刚刚 🔴 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆对特朗普的停火声明表示欢迎，称这是“我们自战争第一天起就一直努力争取的黎巴嫩核心诉求”，也是周二华盛顿会议的主要目标。萨拉姆感谢美国、法国、欧盟国家、沙特阿拉伯、埃及、卡塔尔和约旦所做的努力。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Israeli officials were reportedly “outraged” that Trump announced a Lebanon ceasefire before they held a Security Cabinet vote -i24 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：据报道，以色列官员对特朗普在他们举行安全内阁投票前就宣布黎巴嫩停火感到“愤怒” -i24 推文

text: WarMonitor Pete Hegseth is now comparing the media to the Pharisees who opposed Jesus, using biblical language to dismiss criticism of Trump as biased attacks. Big "holy war" vibes from Pete Hegseth this morning, insinuating that doubting Trump is like doubting Christ https://twitter.com/brianstelter/status/2044762882492010814/video/1 - Brian Stelter tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：皮特·赫格塞斯现在将媒体比作反对耶稣的法利赛人，使用圣经语言来驳斥对特朗普的批评，称其为偏见攻击。皮特·赫格塞斯今天早上散发出浓厚的“圣战”气息，暗示怀疑特朗普就像怀疑基督一样 https://twitter.com/brianstelter/status/2044762882492010814/video/1 - 布莱恩·斯特尔特推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has stated that following today’s announced ceasefire, he will be inviting the Prime Minister of Israel, Benjamin Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, to the White House for the “first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，在今天宣布停火后，他将邀请以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩前往白宫，进行“自1983年以来以色列和黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈”。推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @ColbyBadhwar : 720 per year. By contrast, Lockheed Martin has production capacity for 400 PrSMs per year, although actual deliveries are below that as Full Rate Production has not yet started. Capacity for 500/y ATACMS as well. https://twitter.com/ColbyBadhwar/status/2044807336103944242/photo/1 “Moscow is producing about 60 Iskander missiles a month and has expanded its launcher capacity” https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816?shareType=nongift - Nicole Grajewski tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：转发 @ColbyBadhwar ：每年720枚。相比之下，洛克希德·马丁公司每年有400枚PrSM的生产能力，尽管实际交付量低于此数字，因为全面生产尚未开始。ATACMS的产能也为每年500枚。https://twitter.com/ColbyBadhwar/status/2044807336103944242/photo/1 “莫斯科每月生产约60枚伊斯坎德尔导弹，并扩大了其发射装置产能” https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816?shareType=nongift - 妮可·格拉耶夫斯基推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: I will be inviting the Prime Minister of Israel, Bibi Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, to the White House for the first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983, a very long time ago. Both sides want to see PEACE, and I believe that will happen, quickly! tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普：我将邀请以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩前往白宫，进行自1983年（那是很久以前了）以来以色列和黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈。双方都希望看到和平，我相信这会很快实现！推文

text: Faytuks News Israeli officials and channels are increasingly frustrated with what they deem to be Trump dictating Israeli policy without keeping them in the loop 🚨 🚨 Israeli ministers outraged during the security cabinet meeting: Trump announces Israel’s consent to a ceasefire before Security Cabinet approval. - Amichai Stein tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：以色列官员和频道对特朗普在不通知他们的情况下主导以色列政策的行为感到越来越沮丧 🚨 🚨 以色列部长们在安全内阁会议上感到愤怒：特朗普在安全内阁批准之前就宣布了以色列同意停火。 - 阿米查伊·斯坦推文

text: Instant News Alerts Trump announces 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon and says he will convene summit at the White House between Israel and Lebanese leaders. (Axios) tweet
text_zh: 即时新闻快讯：特朗普宣布以色列和黎巴嫩停火10天，并表示将在白宫召集以色列和黎巴嫩领导人峰会。（Axios）推文

text: Faytuks News Breaking: Trump says he will invite Israel's prime minister Netanyahu and Lebanon's president Aoun to the White House for talks https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2044808029464301907/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：突发：特朗普表示将邀请以色列总理内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统奥恩前往白宫进行会谈 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2044808029464301907/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Army Secretary Dan Driscoll ordered the shutdown of multiple Army-affiliated social media accounts after a post praising Democratic Sen. Tammy Duckworth’s military service sparked backlash from conservative voices. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔下令关闭多个陆军附属社交媒体账户，此前一篇赞扬民主党参议员塔米·达克沃斯军事服役经历的帖子引发了保守派声音的强烈反对。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has announced that after talks today with President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel, following rare direct negotiations this week between the two countries, they have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire beginning Thursday at 5:00PM Eastern Time. Presidency Trump adds that he has instructed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine, to “work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普宣布，在今天与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行会谈，并经过本周两国之间罕见的直接谈判后，他们已同意从东部时间周四下午5:00开始停火10天。特朗普总统补充说，他已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军一起，“与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。”推文

text: OSINTtechnical The aircraft carrier USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN-69) suffered a fire in port this week while undergoing maintenance. Three sailors were injured in what the Navy called a “small fire that was immediately contained.” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044806326585299201/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：航空母舰“德怀特·D·艾森豪威尔”号（CVN-69）本周在港口进行维护时发生火灾。海军称这是一场“立即被扑灭的小火”，有三名水手受伤。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044806326585299201/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah lawmaker Hassan Fadlallah: "We were informed by Iran's ambassador in Beirut that a one-week ceasefire could begin this evening." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉：“我们从伊朗驻贝鲁特大使那里获悉，为期一周的停火可能于今晚开始。”推文

text: WarMonitor Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth recited a fake Bible verse during a Pentagon prayer event that was actually a quote from the movie Pulp Fiction. https://x.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044774310556966938/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯在五角大楼的一次祈祷活动中背诵了一段伪造的圣经经文，实际上那是电影《低俗小说》中的台词。https://x.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2044774310556966938/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普：我刚刚与备受尊敬的黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了出色的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期10天的停火，时间为东部标准时间下午5点。周二，两国在华盛顿特区与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥进行了34年来的首次会面。我已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的9场战争，这将是我的第10场，所以让我们完成它！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普 推文

text: The Trump administration canceled an $11M contract with Catholic Charities in Miami that housed unaccompanied migrant children. The move comes amid tensions between Trump and Pope Leo XIV over issues like migration and U.S. foreign policy. Source: Miami Herald
text_zh: 特朗普政府取消了与迈阿密天主教慈善机构的一份价值1100万美元的合同，该机构负责安置无人陪伴的移民儿童。此举正值特朗普与教皇利奥十四世在移民和美国外交政策等问题上关系紧张之际。来源：迈阿密先驱报

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 An Israeli security official said the military has no plans to withdraw forces from southern Lebanon during any ceasefire. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli cabinet was informed that ground forces are expected to remain in place, while the ceasefire is set to focus on halting aerial strikes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 一位以色列安全官员表示，军方没有计划在任何停火期间从黎巴嫩南部撤军。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列内阁获悉，地面部队预计将留在原地，而停火将集中在停止空袭上。 @wfwitness

text: Trump announced the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon just minutes after Netanyahu convened his security cabinet for an urgent call to discuss and vote on it. Israeli ministers learned of the announcement early in the call, before any real discussion had begun. Source: Barak Ravid
text_zh: 特朗普宣布以色列和黎巴嫩停火，就在内塔尼亚胡召集其安全内阁召开紧急会议讨论并投票表决该事宜的几分钟后。以色列部长们在会议开始时就得知了这一声明，当时还没有进行任何实质性讨论。来源：巴拉克·拉维德

text: Trump: I will be inviting the Prime Minister of Israel, Bibi Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, to the White House for the first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983, a very long time ago. Both sides want to see PEACE, and I believe that will happen, quickly!
text_zh: 特朗普：我将邀请以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩前往白宫，进行自1983年以来以色列与黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈，那已经是很久以前的事了。双方都希望看到和平，我相信这很快就会实现！

text: The radar atop the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad reportedly now has an anti-drone cage installed. Source: OSINTtechnical
text_zh: 据报道，位于巴格达的美国大使馆顶部的雷达现已安装了反无人机笼。来源：OSINTtechnical

text: 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 "The enemies were compelled, compelled to the truce after their great failure to achieve their goals in targeting the Islamic Republic of Iran." Sayyed Abdul-Malik al-Houthi on the two-week truce: The US and Israel carried out major aggression against Iran to implement a dangerous phase of the Zionist plan and suffered great losses. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 “敌人在未能实现其针对伊朗伊斯兰共和国的目标并遭遇重大失败后，被迫接受了停火。”赛义德·阿卜杜勒-马利克·胡塞在谈到为期两周的停火时表示：美国和以色列对伊朗进行了重大侵略，旨在实施犹太复国主义计划的危险阶段，但遭受了巨大损失。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump says he will invite Israeli criminal Netanyahu and Lebanese President Aoun to the White House for talks.
text_zh: 特朗普表示，他将邀请以色列罪犯内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统奥恩前往白宫进行会谈。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 An Israeli security official said the military has no plans to withdraw forces from southern Lebanon during any ceasefire. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. President Trump says he will invite Netanyahu and Lebanese President Aoun to the White House: In addition to the statement just issued, I will be inviting the Prime Minister of Israel, Bibi Netanyahu, and the President of Lebanon, Joseph Aoun, to the White House for the first meaningful talks between Israel and Lebanon since 1983, a very long time ago. Both sides want to see PEACE, and I believe that will happen, quickly! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 一位以色列安全官员表示，军方没有计划在任何停火期间从黎巴嫩南部撤军。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国总统特朗普表示，他将邀请内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统奥恩前往白宫：除了刚刚发表的声明外，我将邀请以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩前往白宫，进行自1983年以来以色列与黎巴嫩之间首次有意义的会谈，那已经是很久以前的事了。双方都希望看到和平，我相信这很快就会实现！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Prime Minister of Lebanon Salam on 10-day ceasefire: I welcome the announcement of the ceasefire declared by President Trump, which is a central Lebanese demand we have pursued since the first day of the war, and was our primary goal in the Washington…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 An Israeli security official said the military has no plans to withdraw forces from southern Lebanon during any ceasefire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理萨拉姆谈10天停火：我欢迎特朗普总统宣布的停火声明，这是我们自战争第一天起就一直在追求的核心黎巴嫩诉求，也是我们在华盛顿的主要目标……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 一位以色列安全官员表示，军方没有计划在任何停火期间从黎巴嫩南部撤军。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 Reuters: Hezbollah lawmaker Hassan Fadlallah says Hezbollah was informed by Iran’s ambassador in Beirut that a one-week ceasefire could begin this evening. Fadlallah said the potential ceasefire is the result of Iranian diplomatic efforts. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Prime Minister of Lebanon Salam on 10-day ceasefire: I welcome the announcement of the ceasefire declared by President Trump, which is a central Lebanese demand we have pursued since the first day of the war, and was our primary goal in the Washington meeting on Tuesday. As I congratulate all Lebanese on this achievement, I pray for the martyrs who fell, and affirm my solidarity with their families, with the wounded, and with the citizens who were forced to flee their cities and villages, and I hold full hope that they will be able to return to them as soon as possible. I also cannot but thank all the regional and international efforts exerted to reach this outcome, especially those by the United States of America, France, European Union countries, and all Arab brothers, led by the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the Arab Republic of Egypt, in addition to the State of Qatar and the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 路透社：真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉表示，真主党已收到伊朗驻贝鲁特大使的通知，为期一周的停火可能于今晚开始。法德拉拉称，潜在的停火是伊朗外交努力的结果。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理萨拉姆谈10天停火：我欢迎特朗普总统宣布的停火声明，这是我们自战争第一天起就一直在追求的核心黎巴嫩诉求，也是我们在周二华盛顿会议上的主要目标。在祝贺所有黎巴嫩人取得这一成就的同时，我为牺牲的烈士祈祷，并重申我与他们的家人、伤者以及被迫逃离城市和村庄的公民站在一起，我怀着全部希望，愿他们能尽快返回家园。我也必须感谢为达成这一结果所付出的所有区域和国际努力，特别是美利坚合众国、法国、欧盟国家以及所有阿拉伯兄弟国家，以沙特阿拉伯王国和阿拉伯埃及共和国为首，此外还有卡塔尔国和约旦哈希姆王国。@wfwitness

text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在宣布停火前2分钟，真主党无人机发射

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukrainian SOF operator prepares to intercept a Russian FPV drone with a pistol-dispensed net but as the drone starts flying away he switches to his main weapon and takes it down with an automatic rifle. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2044803042722099629/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 乌克兰特种作战部队操作员准备用手枪发射的网拦截一架俄罗斯FPV无人机，但当无人机开始飞走时，他切换到主武器并用自动步枪将其击落。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2044803042722099629/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 C14 - A ceasefire in Lebanon could be announced as early as tonight, an Israeli source told Reuters. tweet

text: WarTranslated A satellite image has emerged showing a fire at a petrochemical plant in Bashkortostan, Russia, following a Ukrainian drone attack. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044802311847895451/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一张卫星图像显示，在乌克兰无人机袭击后，俄罗斯巴什科尔托斯坦的一家石化工厂发生火灾。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044802311847895451/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : The term “final solution” was the Nazi regime’s phrase for the systematic extermination of Jews during the Holocaust, so using it today carries direct associations with genocide. Stephen Miller almost says that Trump is seeking a "final solution" in Iran but then catches himself https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor : “最终解决方案”一词是纳粹政权在大屠杀期间系统性灭绝犹太人的用语，因此今天使用它带有与种族灭绝的直接关联。斯蒂芬·米勒差点说特朗普正在伊朗寻求“最终解决方案”，但随后改口了 https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : The administration has abruptly canceled an $11M contract with Catholic Charities to care for unaccompanied migrant children, ending a decades-long partnership with the Catholic Church. (Miami Herald) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044598324565586007/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor : 政府突然取消了与天主教慈善机构价值1100万美元的照看无人陪伴移民儿童的合同，结束了与天主教会长达数十年的合作关系。(迈阿密先驱报) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044598324565586007/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Nimitz-class nuclear-powered aircraft carrier USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN-69) suffered a fire earlier this week that injured 3 sailors. The Eisenhower is nearing the end of its planned incremental availability at Norfolk Naval Shipyard in Portsmouth, VA, that began January 8th, 2025. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 尼米兹级核动力航空母舰“德怀特·D·艾森豪威尔”号 (CVN-69) 本周早些时候发生火灾，造成3名水手受伤。艾森豪威尔号即将结束其于2025年1月8日开始的在弗吉尼亚州朴茨茅斯诺福克海军造船厂的计划内增量维护。 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 BREAKING: Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel beginning at 5 PM EST, following conversations with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Trump states the two leaders met for the first time in 34 years in Washington, D.C., with Secretary of State Marco Rubio present. He has directed VP JD Vance, Rubio, and Joint Chiefs Chairman Dan Razin' Caine to work toward a "Lasting PEACE." "It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE!" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 快讯：特朗普宣布黎巴嫩与以色列之间停火10天，从美东时间下午5点开始，此前他与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡进行了交谈。特朗普表示，两位领导人34年来首次在华盛顿特区会面，国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥在场。他已指示副总统JD·万斯、鲁比奥和参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩致力于实现“持久和平”。“能解决世界各地的9场战争是我的荣幸，这将是第10场，所以让我们完成它！” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: BREAKING: Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE!
text_zh: 快讯：特朗普：我刚刚与备受尊敬的黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期10天的停火，时间为美东时间下午5点。我已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿鲁比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。能解决世界各地的9场战争是我的荣幸，这将是第10场，所以让我们完成它！

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. President Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国总统特朗普宣布以色列与黎巴嫩之间停火10天：我刚刚与备受尊敬的黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期10天的停火，时间为美东时间下午5点。周二，两国34年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区会面，我们伟大的国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥在场。我已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿鲁比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。能解决世界各地的9场战争是我的荣幸，这将是第10场，所以让我们完成它！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普 @wfwitness

text: While the bastard Aoun is on a call with Trump and with the possibility that Netanyahu Will join Israel is carrying a massive wave of bombing on many Lebanese towns, described as fire belts This is a mere hour after the Israeli terrorist army drone strikes a mother and her children in Saadeyet area. Note that a ceasefire is not an end of this war Israel is an occupying force that is demolishing towns as we speak and will continue to do so..razing towns There is a lot more to talk soon about
text_zh: 当混蛋奥恩正在与特朗普通话，且内塔尼亚胡有可能加入时，以色列正在对许多黎巴嫩城镇进行大规模轰炸，被称为火带。这仅仅是在以色列恐怖军队无人机袭击萨阿迪耶地区的一位母亲和她的孩子一小时后。请注意，停火并不意味着这场战争的结束。以色列是一个占领军，正如我们所说，它正在拆毁城镇，并将继续这样做……夷平城镇。很快会有更多关于此的消息

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区激活无人机警报警报器。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 "For more than a month, the movement of ships in this region has been practically stopped due to the unprovoked armed aggression of the USA and Israel against Iran." Russian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Maria Zakharova on the Strait of Hormuz blockade: The blockade has deprived the global market of 5% of all oil, more than 30% of liquefied natural gas, 40% of helium, around 40% of carbamide, 44% of sulfur, more than a quarter of ammonia, and a significant portion of phosphates. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “一个多月来，由于美国和以色列对伊朗发动的无端武装侵略，该地区的船只航行实际上已经停止。” 俄罗斯外交部发言人玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃谈霍尔木兹海峡封锁：封锁使全球市场损失了所有石油的5%、超过30%的液化天然气、40%的氦气、约40%的尿素、44%的硫磺、超过四分之一的氨以及很大一部分磷酸盐。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: A new book, RFK Jr.: The Fall and Rise, claims Robert F. Kennedy Jr. once stopped on a highway to cut off a dead raccoon’s genitals to “study them later.” Source: New York Post
text_zh: 一本名为《小罗伯特·F·肯尼迪：陨落与崛起》（RFK Jr.: The Fall and Rise）的新书声称，小罗伯特·F·肯尼迪曾在一处高速公路上停车，割下了一只死浣熊的生殖器，以便“以后研究”。来源：《纽约邮报》
